workflow.name: stock_query
workflow.description: 股票实时查询工作流范例（selector/http/aggregator/end 等节点正确写法演示）

node.code:
import re
async def main(args): search_result = args.params.get("search_result", "") stock_name = args.params.get("stock_name", "")
# 从搜索结果中提取6位数字股票代码 # 常见格式：600888、sh600888、SZ159981、SH600888 等 codes = re.findall(r'(?:sh|sz|SH|SZ)?(\d{6})', search_result)
# 去重，保持顺序 seen = set() unique_codes = [] for c in codes: if c not in seen: seen.add(c) unique_codes.append(c)
if unique_codes: code = unique_codes[0] # 判断市场：6/9 开头上交所，0/3/15/16/18 开头深交所 if code.startswith(('6', '9')): market = 'sh' else: market = 'sz'
stock_code = f"{market}{code}" api_url = f"http://qt.gtimg.cn/q={stock_code}"
return { "found": True, "stock_code": stock_code, "display_code": code, "api_url": api_url, "error": "" } else: return { "found": False, "stock_code": "", "display_code": "", "api_url": "", "error": f"未找到股票「{stock_name}」的代码，请检查股票名称是否正确" }

import re
async def main(args): response = args.params.get("response", "") stock_code = args.params.get("stock_code", "") display_code = args.params.get("display_code", "")
# qt.gtimg.cn 返回格式: v_sh600888="...字段用~分隔..."; # 字段说明(常见): 0=市场, 1=名称, 2=代码, 3=当前价, 4=昨收, 5=开盘, # 6=最高, 7=最低, 10=成交量(手), 11=成交额(万) match = re.search(r'"([^"]+)"', response) if not match: return {"parsed": False, "raw": response[:200]}
fields = match.group(1).split('~')
name = fields[1] if len(fields) > 1 else "" price = fields[3] if len(fields) > 3 else "0" yesterday_close = fields[4] if len(fields) > 4 else "0" open_price = fields[5] if len(fields) > 5 else "0" volume = fields[6] if len(fields) > 6 else "0" # 成交量(手) high = fields[33] if len(fields) > 33 else "0" # 最高 low = fields[34] if len(fields) > 34 else "0" # 最低 amount = fields[37] if len(fields) > 37 else "0" # 成交额(万元)
# 计算涨跌幅 change_amount = "0.00" change_percent = "0.00%" try: p = float(price) lc = float(yesterday_close) if lc > 0: change = p - lc c_pct = (change / lc) * 100 change_amount = f"{change:+.2f}" change_percent = f"{c_pct:+.2f}%" except: pass
# 格式化数字 try: volume_formatted = f"{int(float(volume)):,}" if volume else "0" except: volume_formatted = volume
try: amount_formatted = f"{float(amount):,.2f}" if amount else "0" except: amount_formatted = amount
return { "parsed": True, "name": name, "stock_code": f"{stock_code} ({display_code})", "price": price, "yesterday_close": yesterday_close, "open_price": open_price, "high": high, "low": low, "volume": volume_formatted, "amount": amount_formatted, "change_amount": change_amount, "change_percent": change_percent, }

node.result: 📊 股票实时行情 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🏷️ 名称：{{name}}（{{stock_code}}） 💰 当前价：{{price}} 元 📈 涨跌：{{change_amount}}（{{change_percent}}） ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 📌 开盘：{{open_price}} 🔺最高：{{high}} 🔻最低：{{low}} 📅 昨收：{{yesterday_close}} 📊 成交量：{{volume}} 手 💵 成交额：{{amount}} 万元

node.code: async def main(args): success = args.params.get("success_val") error = args.params.get("error_val") # 聚合结果：哪个有值用哪个 result = success if success else error return {"result": result}
